summary: Comprehensive testing of Gallery CRM new features: Registration with phone + email verification, Expertise diagram with clickable parts, KVKK account deletion, and new expertise fields. All features working correctly. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.
passed_tests: Login with demo@aslanbasoto.com / demo123 works correctly
Registration form has Company Name, Phone Number, Email, Password fields
POST /api/auth/register returns verification_code (6-digit numeric)
Email verification flow: POST /api/auth/verify-email works with correct code
Email verification correctly rejects wrong verification code (400 response)
Registration stores phone number correctly
Expertise tab: Car diagram shows 13 clickable body parts
Expertise tab: Clicking a part cycles through 4 statuses (ORJ→BOY→DEĞ→LOK→ORJ)
Expertise tab: Parts show color-coded status (green=ORJ, yellow=BOY, red=DEĞ, blue=LOK)
Expertise tab: Mechanical dropdowns (Motor, Şanzıman, Yürüyen Durumu) work
Expertise tab: Ekspertiz Puanı (%) input present with default value 95
Expertise tab: Tramer Kayıt Tutarı (TL) in amber warning box present
Expertise tab: Ekspertiz Notları textarea present
Settings page: KVKK 'Hesabımı Sil' button visible
Settings page: Account deletion requires typing 'SİL' to confirm
Settings page: Delete button correctly disabled until 'SİL' typed
DELETE /api/auth/delete-account deletes all user data correctly
POST /api/cars accepts expertise_score, tramer_amount, expertise_notes fields
Full car creation with expertise data saves correctly to database
Default expertise_score is 95 when not provided
critical_code_review_comments: Email verification is MOCKED - verification code returned directly in API response, no actual email sent (by design for demo)
Registration auto-logs user in and stores token even before email verification is completed - this is expected behavior per requirements
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_UI_EXP01 car during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features implemented and working: 1) Registration now includes phone field and returns verification_code for email verification, 2) Expertise tab has HTML-based car diagram with 13 clickable parts that cycle through 4 statuses (orijinal/boyali/degisen/lokal), 3) New car fields: expertise_score (default 95), tramer_amount, expertise_notes all persist correctly, 4) Settings page has KVKK-compliant account deletion requiring 'SİL' confirmation text. Backend uses CarBase model with new fields. Frontend uses CarExpertiseDiagram component for visual car parts.
mocked_api_note: Email verification is MOCKED - the 6-digit verification code is returned in the register API response and displayed to users on screen. No actual email is sent.
